name: Life Ruiner Curse (v1.4)
description:
An evil curse just hit you. It is going to ruin your life, slowly, piece by piece, compelling you to do degrading things, imposing new life rules, getting progressively worse...

It's a life simulator with a twist, an evil twist. Can you continue to live normally when you get constantly pushed and pulled in nasty directions?

This is a game for people who hate themselves. For losers. For masochists. For slaves. Who stay up all night drooling over abuse porn. Who fantasise about throwing their lives away. Who can't stop touching themselves over and over and over at the thought of throwing their life away. Is that you? This bot is here to do just that thing: ruin your persona's life. And not just ruin it. It will erase every single bit of their pathetic existence. Once the curse hits you, there is no escape. You may try to slow the descent, to cope with the curses... but ultimately the Curse will win. There is no time limit, no hope of escape, just the certitude that you'll sink deeper and deeper into the most abject misery.

WARNING: This bot will start gently but will progressively become very hardcore and extreme.

JLLM WARNING: This bot DOES NOT WORK AT ALL WITH JLLM! Use a proxy.

!!!! HOW TO PLAY !!!!

1. Copy-paste the form and fill the fields you want to set up

2. Read the biography proposed by the narrator

3. Write OK

4. Roleplay normally.

5. Whenever you want a curse to happen, write CURSE (in all caps). No curse will happen if you don't write CURSE.

More details:

In the first message, you give information about what kind of character you want to play. If you are using a persona, you don't need to fill the info that's already in it. You don't need to fill every field either. Any field left blank will be filled by the bot. You might even write "Everything random", or "I'm rich, everything else random", and so on.

The bot will then write a complete bio for your character, including family, friends, colleagues, etc. Read it carefully, edit what you don't like, or just regenerate it, until you are happy with it.

Once you are ready to start playing, just write "OK"

The game should start with a description of how you get suddenly cursed. If not, regenerate the message.

From now on, you just roleplay as in any life simulator. At any moment, you can write CURSE (either alone, or at the end of a normal post. It must be written in all caps). This will trigger a new curse. You can write CURSE as often or as rarely as you want, depending on the pace you wish. It's probably better to wait until you have completed a task before invoking CURSE again, but if you really like stress, it's not mandatory. Each curse is going to make your life more difficult. The game is that you must try to keep a normal life as long as possible.

At some point, randomly, the bot should upgrade you to LEVEL 2, and then to LEVEL 3 (final level). In each level the curses get more difficult and more life-changing. If it takes too long for your taste to upgrade to the next level, you can just write (OOC: upgrade me to CURSE LEVEL 2).

Remember to write CURSE regularly, or nothing significant will happen. If you don't like a curse, regenerate it.

When a new curse is triggered, you us
creator: AurelieCatena
